115.reason: The line number should be i+1 (since line numbers start from 1), but i is used (starting from 0), causing the error line number to be off by one.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  The line number should be i+1 (since line numbers start from 1), but i is used (starting from 0), causing the error line number to be off by one.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: The errorRow should be set to i+1 (line number starting from 1), but here it is set to i (0-indexed), causing the error line number to be off by one.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: should be i+1 to match 1-based line numbering]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Line number should be i+1 because line numbers start from 1, not 0]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  The loop index i is 0-based, but the problem requires 1-based line numbers for error reporting. Additionally, hasError() checks errorRow != 0, so an error on line 1 (index 0) would be incorrectly ignored.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Line numbers should be 1-based, so it should be i + 1. Setting it to i (0-based) causes hasError() to return false for errors on line 1.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  // Error: line number should be i+1, not i, because line numbers start from 1 but 'i' is 0-based index
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [The error row should be i+1 because line numbers start from 1, but i is 0-based index]

161.reason: Missing bounds check curPos + 1 < line.length() before accessing charAt, which will throw StringIndexOutOfBoundsException if the operator is at the end of a line.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Missing bounds check curPos + 1 < line.length() before accessing charAt, which will throw StringIndexOutOfBoundsException if the operator is at the end of a line.
